ocr_findings.description: 三大特性 table: cell content for 機密性, 完全性, 可用性 rows spans multiple lines with embedded '実際に試験で出た...' sub-examples. OCR renders these as continuation within the same cell rather than clearly separated sub-rows — structure is readable but slightly flattened.

reviewer_notes: Page covers ISMS三大特性 (機密性/完全性/可用性) with a 3-row table and a サイバーセキュリティ基本法 sidebar. All table content including exam example bullets is present. Minor table cell boundary flattening is cosmetic and does not lose any content.
